name: RA2/YR Map Validator (FA2P Model-Level Fix)
description: Validate and auto-repair RA2/YR maps using FA2sp model-level fixer. Parses maps into memory, fixes coordinate conflicts, invalid references, and structural issues, then serializes back to file. More thorough than line-based fixer.

inputs.label: Map Path
inputs.help: A single .yrm/.map file or a folder containing map files to validate and fix

inputs.label: Recursive Scan
inputs.help: Recursively scan subfolders for map files

inputs.label: Quiet Mode
inputs.help: Only output summary, suppress per-file details

outputs.label: Validation results with FA2P fix summary
